name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans from $100 to $50,000 in Memphis, TN, with same-day funding available for applicants who apply by noon.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a single brick-and-mortar location at 1473 S Trezevant St #23 in Memphis, Tennessee. The company focuses on car title loans secured against a borrower's vehicle, serving Memphis-area residents who need fast access to cash and may not qualify for traditional bank financing due to poor credit or past bankruptcies.

The company offers two lending tiers: smaller loans from $100 to $2,000 and larger loans from $2,000 to $50,000, both secured against the borrower's vehicle title. A key selling point is same-day funding for applicants who complete the process by noon. Borrowers retain use of their vehicle during the repayment period, receiving their title back once the loan is repaid. Applications can be initiated online, and the office is staffed Monday through Friday from 9am to 7pm and Saturday from 10am to 5pm.

Swift Title Loans explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies, positioning itself as a lender of last resort for consumers shut out of conventional credit markets. Customer reviews consistently reference a staff member named Alfred, who is described as patient, transparent about loan terms, and helpful with paperwork. The office is described as clean and welcoming, and the company uses 256-bit SSL and TLS security for online interactions.

However, the website discloses no APR, fee schedule, or repayment term information — a significant omission for any lender, and especially concerning for title loans, which typically carry very high interest rates. Title loans carry inherent risk: failure to repay means the lender can repossess the borrower's vehicle. Customers in reviews flagged the absence of a mobile payment app, limited payment plan options, and crowded parking. Sunday hours are not available.
pros: Explicitly accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies with no stated minimum score
Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
You keep your car and continue using it during the repayment period
Wide loan range from $100 up to $50,000 to cover varying needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS security on online applications
In-person staff described in reviews as patient and transparent about loan terms
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment term information disclosed on the website
Title loans carry repossession risk — defaulting means losing your vehicle
Single Memphis location only; no branches or fully remote lending option confirmed
No mobile app for managing or tracking payments (flagged by multiple customers)
Closed Sundays; limited options if emergency arises over the weekend
best_for: Memphis-area vehicle owners who need same-day cash and have bad credit
Borrowers with past bankruptcies who cannot qualify for unsecured loans
Consumers needing amounts too large for payday loans but ineligible for bank personal loans
Borrowers comfortable with in-person service and a local lender relationship
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents who own a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle, need cash quickly, and have exhausted conventional credit options due to bad credit or bankruptcy. The main caveat is that the website discloses no interest rates or fees — borrowers should request full APR and repayment terms before signing, as title loans commonly carry triple-digit APRs and repossession is the consequence of default.
services: Title loans for borrowers with past bankruptcies
In-person loan processing at Memphis location
Vehicle title return upon full repayment
Loan term and paperwork consultation with staff
